title: Ubi-Utils
description: Catch people op abusing or admin abusing. (Gamemode Switches)
body:
![ubi-utils title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4a5aa9948878b33ee33571fd3dc3b4a386b4d9b.png)
## Catch Op/Admin Abusers!
(1.21.11 version released!)

### works on most servers
-------------------------------
## Utilities

- **GamemodeNotifier** (Notifies the player when someone changes their gamemode)
- **TabIntegration** (Integrates each players gamemode in TabGUI)
- **Notification History** (saves history of gamemode notifications)
- **No Weather** (sets weather to clear client-side)
- **Chat Plus** (increases chat history)
- **Auto Reconnect** (auto reconnects after disconnection)


## Commands

- **/ubi-help** _(lists all modules)_
- **/ubi-help 2** _(lists all cmds)_
- **/ubi-ping** _(shows ping/latency)_
- **/ubi-toggle** _(toggles modules)_
- **/ubi-keybind** _(enable/disable a key to open GUI)_
- **/ubi-info** _(info about the mod)_

## Usage
* **Keybind to open the gui can be changed in the default minecraft keybind settings or /ubi-keybind <key/disable>**

To open the Utility GUI, go into a world or server and press the key "insert" (by default) on your keyboard.

This will open up a menu which you can toggle on/off the modules.

## Installation

Download the jar from [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ubiutils) with the **dependencies**.

Put the jar inside your mod folder along with the **dependencies**.

## Dependencies (MOD WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT THESE)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

_yacl may be needed on lower versions_
 
### **If you run into any issues DM ```@ubiqqe``` on discord.**
